---

title: "D04_05: Poisson Analysis Wrappers"
subtitle: "Wrapper entry points that delegate to core Poisson scripts"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_05"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on: []
outputs_to:
  - "D04_06_app_data_publishing"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_05.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "all_D04_05.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/all/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_05: Poisson Analysis Wrappers {#overview}

This task provides wrapper entry points that delegate to the core Poisson
analysis scripts. It does not implement new logic itself.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Delegates To |
|----------|--------|----------|--------------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_05.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | `cbz_D04_02.R` |
| All | `all_D04_05.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/all/` | `all_D04_08.R` |

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
RUN D04_05_wrappers:
  FOR CBZ: RUN cbz_D04_02
  FOR ALL: REQUIRE D04_09 THEN RUN all_D04_08
```

## Platform Preconditions

- **CBZ**: Requires time series tables; run D04_04 (CBZ wrapper to ETL) if
  `app_data.df_cbz_sales_complete_time_series_{product_line}` is missing.
- **ALL**: Requires `D04_09` to provide `processed_data.df_precision_features`.
- **EBY**: No wrapper; run `eby_D04_02.R` directly.

## Outputs

- `processed_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_{product_line}` (CBZ, via D04_02)
- `app_data.df_{platform}_poisson_analysis_all` (CBZ, via D04_02)
- `processed_data.df_precision_poisson_analysis` (ALL, via D04_08)

## Notes

- This is a wrapper-only step; core logic lives in D04_02 (CBZ/EBY) and
  D04_08 (ALL).
- D04_05 is an optional entry point and should not be treated as a required pipeline step.

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_06: App Data Publishing](D04_06_app_data_publishing.qmd).
